 {"id":"bd-0nes","title":"Enable parallel test execution with proper isolation","description":"Run tests in parallel for faster execution.

Components:
- run_parallel_tests(): Execute tests in parallel with isolation
- Per-test temp directories (already namespaced)
- Proper cleanup on interrupt
- Aggregate results from parallel runs
- --jobs N option for parallelism control

Acceptance:
- Tests run in parallel without interference
- Total test time reduced by 50%+
- Results correctly aggregated","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:53:03.626856246-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-04T23:41:31.687527502-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-04T23:41:31.687527502-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented parallel test execution with job limiting. Added -j N option to run_all_tests.sh and run_parallel_tests() to test_framework.sh. Includes proper cleanup on interrupt and result aggregation.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-0nes","depends_on_id":"bd-wrfp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:53:03.646078152-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-0nes","depends_on_id":"bd-jzmw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:53:03.666159296-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-0ujx","title":"E2E: Review workflow integration tests","description":"## Objective
Complete end-to-end tests for the review workflow (bd-4bmq feature).

## Test Scenarios
1. Review initialization on clean repo
2. Review with existing state file
3. Multi-repo review batch processing
4. Review with quality gates (lint, test, security)
5. Review abort and cleanup
6. Review completion and metrics export

## Requirements
- Real git operations and file system state
- JSON logging with structured fields: repo, phase, gate, result, timing
- Test both happy path and error conditions
- Verify state file consistency throughout
- Integration with gh CLI (or test stubs with clear boundaries)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 6 scenarios have passing tests
- [ ] Logging captures full audit trail
- [ ] State file integrity verified at each checkpoint
- [ ] Cleanup leaves no orphaned files","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:56:25.167142031-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-04T21:56:25.167142031-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-0ujx","depends_on_id":"bd-6crg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:56:36.799466125-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-0ujx","depends_on_id":"bd-g7gw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:57:40.985292331-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
